positive: A stylized, symmetrical celestial owl, sitting upright on a crescent moon branch, illuminated by soft bioluminescent starlight. The owl's feathers are rendered in deep midnight blues, aquamarines, and iridescent silver, forming intricate geometric patterns. The scene features swirling nebula clouds in lavender and teal, balanced by dark cosmic voids. Composition must be central and highly detailed, resembling a high-contrast mandala illustration. The style is a blend of neo-tribal, celestial gothic art, and fine linework engraving. Use strong, solid black lines for contrast and definition. Print on a solid background.
